title: Botany Fields - ARCHIVE
description: Enter the world of Botany Fields farming mod with tons of fresh decorations along with new seeds, plants and a lot more!
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01d099681d8ca320155940fcd83135310017721e.png)

# 📥 **_Installation_**
Click [Versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-fields/versions) and download the version of mod you want! Then put Botany Fields into mod folder like any other mod. If you have any problems with downloading my mod, write to me on discord **_newqu_**.

# ✨ **_About Mod_**
Dive into the world of Botany Fields with a tweak of fresh new decorations along with new seeds and plants. Satisfying mod, that helps you improve your farm by adding new decorations along with new delicious vegetables and fruits to grow. Special mechanics, new crafting, recipes and more!! Stay tuned for more information about mod!

# 📝 **_Info_**
Mod has been in early development for a little while, so there is almost no new content added to the game yet. I'm an early minecraft mod dev, so I'm really not good at scripting or modeling, or texturing. This mod is my second mod I've ever made, so please look at this not from a professional point of view. This mod is made from passion and from boredom. I will constantly upgrade and improve the mod to make it better and funnier, and more satisfying to play with, That's all.

# 🧨 **_Leaks_**
( no leaks)
**Mod made by _bananasquare_**
